title: Metals gain amid speculation of fresh stimulus measures in China
section_path: Metals gain amid speculation of fresh stimulus measures in China
section_path_text: Metals gain amid speculation of fresh stimulus measures in China
summary:
Main
Industrial metals gained amid expectations of support measures in China. Geopolitical risks continue to weigh on energy markets. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-09-24 112903.png | assets/2024-09-24_metals-gain-amid-speculation-of-fresh-stimulus-measures-in-china_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_ddd00a9730d6.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil prices fell as geopolitical risks eased.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Industrial metals gained amid expectations of support measures in China. Geopolitical risks continue to weigh on energy markets.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil prices fell as geopolitical risks eased. After Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah traded rocket fire, Iranian President, Masoud Pezeshkian, said his country is prepared to de-escalate tension as long as it sees the same level of commitment on the other side.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: India's cut to import duty by 9% to 6% is a game changer to mitigate negative impact of higher domestic prices. Strong consumer sentiment will likely spur restocking by retailers ahead of the festive and wedding season.
